_instructions: This file contains all bilingual text for the website. Edit the 'zh' values to update Chinese content. Edit 'en' values to update English. Never change the 'key' values — those are used by the code. See HOW-TO-UPDATE.md.

banner.en: Now in New York — Spring 2026 · Handmade silk flower jewelry from the East
banner.zh: 现已登陆纽约 — 2026年春 · 来自东方的手工丝绸花朵珠宝

tagline.en: For your eyes, your story, your memories — a silk flower jewel from the East, made just for you.
tagline.zh: 为你的眼睛、你的故事、你的记忆——定制一朵来自东方的丝绸花朵珠宝。

manifesto.en: Born in a Chinese silk flower studio with five years of craftsmanship, Silora Orient now begins a new chapter in New York.
manifesto.zh: 诞生于中国丝绸花坊，五年匠心传承，Silora Orient 在纽约开启全新篇章。

tagline.en: For your eyes, your story, your memories — a silk flower jewel from the East, made just for you.
tagline.zh: 为你的眼睛、你的故事、你的记忆——定制一朵来自东方的丝绸花朵珠宝。

craft_note.en: Handmade in the tradition of Chinese 缠花 craftsmanship
craft_note.zh: 以中国传统缠花工艺手工制作

step1_title.en: What is the color of your eyes?

step1_desc.en: We will build your flower around this — around the particular way you see the world.
step1_desc.zh: 我们将围绕这个颜色，围绕你看世界的独特方式，为你塑造专属花朵。

step3_title.en: What memory or person inspires this piece?
step3_title.zh: 是什么记忆或人，启发了这件作品？

step5_title.en: What would you like it to be?

closing.en: We will create a flower that belongs only to you.
closing.zh: 我们将为你创造一朵只属于你的花。

alt_option.zh: 或者自由分享你的想法

clip_note.en: If you do not have pierced ears, clip-on versions are also available.
clip_note.zh: 如果没有耳洞，我们也提供夹式耳饰。

upload_label.en: Upload a photo of your eyes for inspiration (optional)
upload_label.zh: 上传一张眼睛的照片作为灵感参考（可选）

subtitle.en: We reply within a few days — because every piece is made by hand, and so is every response.
subtitle.zh: 我们会在几天内回复——因为每件作品都是手工制作的，每一封回复也是。

success.en: Thank you. We will be in touch within a few days.
success.zh: 谢谢你。我们会在几天内与你联系。

note.en: Because each piece is handmade and may vary by customization, production time, and delivery location, pricing is shared individually.
note.zh: 由于每件作品均为手工定制，价格因定制内容、制作时间及收货地点而有所不同，我们将单独告知报价。

success.en: Thank you. We will reply with pricing within 2–3 days.
success.zh: 谢谢。我们将在2-3天内回复报价。
